news_title: Ignored No More: Datavault AI Turns Heads After Getting $150 Million From Scilex Holding (NASDAQ:DVLT)
summary: Datavault AI (NASDAQ:DVLT)has secured a transformative$150 million strategic investment from Scilex Holding Company, triggering a102% stock surge. The company, which evolved from WiSA Technologies, reported impressiveQ2 2025 revenue of $1.7 million, representing a467% year-over-year increase, with an additional$2.5 million in unrecognized licensing revenue.The strategic investment, executed in BTC at spot rate, positions Datavault to accelerate its supercomputing infrastructure and data exchange platforms. The company's portfolio includes72 issued, allowed, and pending patents, focusing on authenticating, securing, and monetizing digital assets across multiple industries. Scilex will receive shares and pre-funded warrants, subject to shareholder approval, with board nomination rights tied to ownership levels.
